name: meep-photonic-devices-v1
description: Paper-oriented benchmark suite for block-based photonic inverse design across mode-conversion, splitting, and spectral-routing tasks.
paper_hypothesis: An autonomous, provenance-aware MEEP workflow can optimize distinct photonic device classes with task-specific figures of merit while preserving reproducibility artifacts.

baseline_notes: Compare against random search under the same run budget.
Record device-class-specific secondary metrics such as split balance and demux score.
Treat these as block-parameter screening tasks rather than full adjoint topology optimization.
